checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: 35 node tests passed; MDE parser checked project JSON/JSONL files; traceability validator checked required IDs through GEN-019/SE-0003/ARCH-0.3-candidate/ADL-0003; fixture index check passed; fixture evaluation passed.

checks.name: npm run embed:cranfield -- --provider ollama --model llama3.1:8b
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/embeddings-ollama-llama31-8b-title-abstract-gen019.json records local Ollama embeddings for 1,400 documents and 225 queries with dimension 4,096.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:vector
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-vector-ollama-llama31-8b-title-abstract-gen019.json records Ollama vector-only nDCG@10 0.0282 and best depth-50 hybrid nDCG@10 0.3035.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:vector -- --vector-depth 100
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-vector-ollama-llama31-8b-title-abstract-depth100-gen019.json records best depth-100 Ollama hybrid nDCG@10 0.3026.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:vector -- --k 20 --relevance-mode binary
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-vector-ollama-llama31-8b-title-abstract-k20-binary-gen019.json records best Ollama binary nDCG@20 0.4343, below refined PRF comparable nDCG@20 0.4563.

blocked_or_skipped.name: remote OpenSearch vector index validation
blocked_or_skipped.reason: Deferred because the offline Ollama hybrid result did not beat refined PRF.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-019 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

high_findings.summary: ARCH-0.2-candidate refined prf-rerank remains candidate-only until BEIR transferability is measured.

medium_findings.summary: Ollama llama3.1:8b chat-model embeddings remain below refined PRF and should not be promoted.

evidence_quality: GEN-019 validates a real local Ollama embedding run and records that the available chat-model embeddings do not improve NDCG enough for promotion.
